description: Official SAT practice resources from College Board.

title: Executive Functioning Skills
description: Assessment with scoring guide, explanations, and goal-setting space across executive-function domains.

title: Life Skills Inventory
description: Life-skills inventory available as a printable PDF and as a Google Sheets version. For the sheet, open it and go to File > Make a copy before editing.

title: Life Skills Checklist
description: Broad life-skills checklist often useful for students with more significant support needs.

description: Fillable PDF version that can be downloaded and shared electronically.

description: One-pager implementation guide and blank form from I'm Determined.

title: Dream Plan Interview
description: Guided interview to help students identify future goals and priorities.

description: Fillable planning form for documenting dreams, preferences, and support needs.

description: Online self-reflection activity focused on identifying personal strengths.

description: Online assessment focused on identifying student preferences.

description: Online assessment focused on identifying support needs and priorities.

description: Visual supports for discussing dreams, fears, interests, needs, and preferences.

title: My Next Move (O*NET Interest Profiler)
description: Online interest profile that generates a score report.

description: Printable short-form version for student completion.

description: Department of Labor skills matcher that helps students self-evaluate skills and knowledge.

description: Short videos offering snapshots of different jobs in English and Spanish.

title: CTE Career Clusters Interest Survey
description: Career-cluster interest survey available in English and Spanish.

description: Career-interest survey focused on student motivators, available in English and Spanish.

title: Soft Skills
description: One-page work-skills evaluation.

title: Values Scale
description: Two-page values activity to help identify what matters most in a job or career.

description: Online work-maturity and work-skills self-assessment.

title: Pictorial Interest Inventory
description: Interest inventory organized around multiple career fields.

title: O*NET Interest Profiler, Pictorial Version
description: Pictorial assessment with matching score sheet for students who benefit from more visual supports.

title: Visual Student Survey
description: Strength- and interest-based pictorial assessment that also includes independent living and leisure.

title: What Do You Prefer?
description: Assesses student preferences around work qualities like environment and social interaction.

group: Assessments for Students with High Support Needs
title: Employment Checklist
description: Checklist of prerequisite knowledge and skills for obtaining a job, targeted toward students ages 14-22 with disabilities.

title: Cottonwood/CDDO (Douglas County)
description: Supports individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities in accessing community services and supports.

title: Families Together
description: Support, information, and training for families of children with disabilities and special healthcare needs.

title: Home and Community Based Waiver Service Information
description: Kansas state information on HCBS programs for individuals with disabilities and older adults.

title: Independence, Inc.
description: Services and support to help individuals with disabilities live independently in the community.

title: Kansas Guardianship Program
description: Legal guardianship services for adults with disabilities who do not have family or friends able to serve in that role.

title: Kansas Vocational Rehabilitation Services
description: Employment preparation and vocational rehabilitation services for individuals with disabilities.

title: Ready for Good
description: Social enterprise employing individuals with disabilities to create sustainable products.

title: Van Go, Inc.
description: Arts-based programming for youth with disabilities and other challenges.

title: CEC Division on Career Development and Transition
description: Council for Exceptional Children division focused on career development and transition for students with disabilities.

title: NTACT:C
description: Technical assistance and dissemination center focused on transition planning and services for youth with disabilities.

title: The Transition Coalition
description: Training and technical assistance organization aimed at improving transition outcomes for youth with disabilities.

title: Zarrow Institute on Transition and Self-Determination
description: Institute focused on improving transition outcomes and promoting self-determination.

title: Transition Bell Ringers
description: Bell ringers centered around core transition ideas from self-awareness to student participation in the IEP process.

title: Fundamental Transition Skills
description: Bell ringers focused on fundamental transition-related skills.

title: Functional Transition Skills
description: Bell ringers focused on functional transition skills.

title: Daily Living/Independent Living
description: Bell ringers focused on daily living and independent living topics.

description: Bell ringers focused on everyday math skills.

title: Quick Transition Activities
description: Transition Tennessee resource with lessons, embedded videos, flash cards, and exercises covering a wide range of transition topics.

title: Families Together Transition to Adulthood
description: Kansas-based transition-to-adulthood resource page including overview content, family information, and self-paced modules.

title: Quickbook of Transition Assessments
description: Collection of transition assessments for students, families, and teachers across transition domains.

description: Guide to the what, why, and how of transition assessment with additional resource links.

description: Indiana Secondary Transition Resource Center matrix for filtering transition assessments by topic, grade level, language, and support need.

title: T-Folio
description: Online transition assessment and planning platform with activities related to strengths, preferences, needs, career clusters, and work skills.

title: TAGG
description: The Transition Assessment and Goal Generator from the Zarrow Institute at the University of Oklahoma, with High School and Alternate versions available and a Middle School version noted as in development.

description: Article outlining steps educators can take to support student-led IEP implementation.
